glosses.ja: 女性従業員; 女性社員

sentences.target: Die Mitarbeiterin hilft mir an der Kasse.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈmɪtʔaʁbaɪ̯təʁɪn hɪlft miːɐ̯ an deːɐ̯ ˈkasə/

translations.de: Die Mitarbeiterin hilft mir an der Kasse.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈmɪtʔaʁbaɪ̯təʁɪn hɪlft miːɐ̯ an deːɐ̯ ˈkasə/
translations.en: The employee is helping me at the register.
translations.es: La cajera me atiende en la caja.
translations.fr: La caissière m'aide à la caisse.
translations.it: La cassiera mi aiuta alla cassa.
translations.zh-Hans: 收银员正在收银台帮我结账。
translations.yue: 收銀員喺櫃枱幫我結帳。
translations.pt: A funcionária está me ajudando no caixa.
translations.vi: Nhân viên thu ngân đang giúp tôi ở quầy tính tiền.
translations.nl: De caissière helpt me bij de kassa.
translations.hi: काउंटर पर कर्मचारी मेरी मदद कर रही है.
translations.el: Η ταμίας με βοηθά στο ταμείο.
translations.nb: Den ansatte hjelper meg i kassen.
translations.id: Kasir sedang membantu saya di kasir.
translations.ja: レジで店員が手伝ってくれています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular; marks the subject noun phrase.
Feminine noun; nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present; takes a dative object ('mir') and a locative PP ('an der Kasse').
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular dative; indirect object/recipient of 'hilft'.
Preposition selecting dative for static location; introduces the PP 'an der Kasse'.
Definite article; dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Kasse' as object of 'an'.
Feminine noun; dative singular; object of the preposition 'an' indicating location.

sentences.target: Ich frage die Mitarbeiterin nach dem Preis.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː ˈmɪtʔaʁbaɪ̯təʁɪn naːx deːm pʁaɪ̯s/

translations.de: Ich frage die Mitarbeiterin nach dem Preis.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː ˈmɪtʔaʁbaɪ̯təʁɪn naːx deːm pʁaɪ̯s/
translations.en: I ask the employee about the price.
translations.es: Le pregunto el precio a la empleada.
translations.fr: Je demande le prix à l'employée.
translations.he: אני שואל את העובדת על המחיר.
translations.vi: Tôi hỏi nhân viên về giá.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de medewerkster naar de prijs.
translations.hi: मैं कर्मचारी से कीमत के बारे में पूछता हूँ.
translations.el: Ρωτάω την υπάλληλο για την τιμή.
translations.nb: Jeg spør den ansatte om prisen.
translations.id: Saya bertanya kepada pegawai tentang harga.
translations.ja: 店員に値段を聞きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite verb; 1st person singular present; takes an accusative addressee ('die Mitarbeiterin') and 'nach + DAT' for the topic.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular (form identical to nominative); marks the direct object/addressee.
Feminine noun; accusative singular; direct object/addressee of 'frage'.
Preposition selecting dative; here expresses the topic of inquiry ('nach dem Preis').
Definite article; dative masculine singular; agrees with 'Preis' as object of 'nach'.
Masculine noun; dative singular; object of the preposition 'nach'.

sentences.target: Die neue Mitarbeiterin beginnt heute im Büro.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈnɔɪ̯ə ˈmɪtʔaʁbaɪ̯təʁɪn bəˈɡɪnt ˈhɔɪ̯tə ɪm byˈʁoː/

translations.de: Die neue Mitarbeiterin beginnt heute im Büro.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈnɔɪ̯ə ˈmɪtʔaʁbaɪ̯təʁɪn bəˈɡɪnt ˈhɔɪ̯tə ɪm byˈʁoː/
translations.en: The new employee starts today at the office.
translations.es: La nueva empleada empieza hoy en la oficina.
translations.fr: La nouvelle employée commence aujourd'hui au bureau.
translations.it: La nuova impiegata inizia oggi in ufficio.
translations.ko: 새로 온 직원이 오늘 사무실에서 일을 시작해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 新来的员工今天在办公室开始上班。
translations.yue: 新嚟嘅員工今日喺辦公室開始上班。
translations.ru: Новая сотрудница сегодня начинает работать в офисе.
translations.pt: A nova funcionária começa hoje no escritório.
translations.tr: Yeni çalışan bugün ofiste işe başlıyor.
translations.vi: Nhân viên mới bắt đầu làm việc hôm nay ở văn phòng.
translations.ar: الموظفة الجديدة تبدأ اليوم في المكتب.
translations.nl: De nieuwe medewerkster begint vandaag op kantoor.
translations.uk: Нова співробітниця сьогодні починає працювати в офісі.
translations.hu: Az új munkatárs ma kezd az irodában.
translations.hi: नई कर्मचारी आज ऑफिस में काम शुरू कर रही है.
translations.pl: Nowa pracownica zaczyna dziś w biurze.
translations.el: Η νέα υπάλληλος ξεκινά σήμερα στο γραφείο.
translations.nb: Den nye medarbeideren starter i dag på kontoret.
translations.id: Karyawan baru mulai bekerja hari ini di kantor.
translations.sv: Den nya medarbetaren börjar i dag på kontoret.
translations.ro: Noua angajată începe astăzi la birou.
translations.cs: Nová zaměstnankyně dnes začíná v kanceláři.
translations.da: Den nye medarbejder begynder i dag på kontoret.
translations.ja: 新しい社員が今日からオフィスで働き始めます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular; part of the subject NP.
Attributive adjective; nominative feminine singular; weak inflection (-e) after definite article; modifies 'Mitarbeiterin'.
Feminine noun; nominative singular; subject.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present; main predicate.
Temporal adverb indicating time.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition selecting dative; introduces locative PP; includes the definite article 'dem' (neuter).
Neuter noun; dative singular; object of the preposition 'im' indicating location.

sentences.target: Wir warten auf die Mitarbeiterin am Schalter.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈvaʁtən aʊ̯f diː ˈmɪtʔaʁbaɪ̯təʁɪn am ˈʃaltɐ/

translations.de: Wir warten auf die Mitarbeiterin am Schalter.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈvaʁtən aʊ̯f diː ˈmɪtʔaʁbaɪ̯təʁɪn am ˈʃaltɐ/
translations.en: We are waiting for the employee at the counter.
translations.es: Estamos esperando a la empleada en la ventanilla.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在窗口等工作人员。
translations.pt: Estamos esperando a funcionária no balcão.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đợi nhân viên ở quầy.
translations.nl: We wachten op de medewerkster bij het loket.
translations.hi: हम काउंटर पर कर्मचारी का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi venter på den ansatte ved skranken.
translations.sv: Vi väntar på expediten vid luckan.
translations.da: Vi venter på medarbejderen ved skranken.
translations.ja: 窓口で職員を待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Finite verb; 1st person plural present; commonly used with 'auf + ACC' for the thing/person awaited.
Preposition; with 'warten' it selects accusative to mark the awaited entity ('auf die Mitarbeiterin').
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; marks the prepositional object of 'auf'.
Feminine noun; accusative singular; object of the preposition 'auf' (awaited person).
Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition selecting dative for static location; introduces 'am Schalter'.
Masculine noun; dative singular; object of 'am' indicating location.
